How to Use a Dining Plan at Walt Disney World

Between Mickey-shaped treats, memorable meals with characters, and can’t-miss snacks, dining is part of the fun at Walt Disney World. Disney Dining Plans make it easier to savor it all, and starting with 2027 vacations, you can customize your dining experience even more with the new Deluxe Table-Service Dining Plan.
